# ceph_rbd_snapshot (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `image` (String) Name of the RBD image.
- `name` (String) Snapshot name.
- `pool` (String) Pool containing the RBD image.

### Optional

- `created_at` (String) Snapshot creation timestamp (not available from Ceph).
- `force_delete` (Boolean) Force deletion even if snapshot is protected or in use.
- `protected` (Boolean) Whether the snapshot is protected.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Snapshot ID in the form pool/image@snap
